notice.title: Emergency O- Blood Required
notice.content: A patient needs 2 bags of O- blood immediately at Dhaka Medical College Hospital. Please contact +880170000000.

notice.title: Blood Donation Camp 2026
notice.content: Join our annual blood donation camp at University Campus this Friday from 9 AM to 4 PM.

notice.title: Thalassemia Patient Needs B+
notice.content: Regular requirement of B+ blood for a 5-year-old Thalassemia patient. Scheduled donation needed.

notice.title: Accident Victim Needs AB+
notice.content: Urgent requirement of AB+ blood at Square Hospital due to a major accident. Please help.
